summary: Restaurant website project (likely Mexican food) where the user wants to restore original Mexican food images from the live website version 9, replacing incorrect Chinese food images currently shown.
known_issues: Wrong images (Chinese food) are showing instead of the original Mexican food images from live website version 9
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Authentic Mexican street tacos on a rustic wooden board with cilantro, lime wedges, and salsa (taco-menu-item.dim_600x400.png)
- Loaded Mexican burrito cut in half showing rice, beans, and seasoned meat filling (burrito-menu-item.dim_600x400.png)
- Golden crispy quesadilla sliced into wedges with sour cream and guacamole dipping sauces (quesadilla-menu-item.dim_600x400.png)
- Tortilla chips in a basket with fresh chunky salsa roja in a small bowl (chips-salsa-menu-item.dim_600x400.png)
- Mexican catering spread with trays of tacos, rice, beans, and colorful garnishes at an outdoor event (catering-banner.dim_1200x600.png)

existing_features.title: Replace the image displayed in the first menu item card (article 1, XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[2]/article[1]/div[1]/div[1]) with the correct original Mexican food image from version 9. The current image shows Chinese food and must be replaced with the authentic Mexican food image that was present on the live website at version 9.

The current image shows Chinese food and must be replaced with the authentic Mexican food image from the live website.

The current image shows Chinese food and must be replaced with the authentic Mexican food image from the live website.

The current image shows Chinese food and must be replaced with the authentic Mexican food image from the live website.

new_feature_requests.summary: Restore original Mexican food images from live website version 9, replacing the incorrect Chinese food images currently displayed

Replace the image in the catering section (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[3]/div[2]/div[2]/img[1]) with the correct original Mexican food/catering image from version 9. The current image is incorrect and must be replaced with the authentic catering image that appeared on the live version 9 website.
